title: Buying a Gift 买礼物
scene: Tom想给妈妈买生日礼物，请姐姐帮忙挑选。

lines.en: Anna, Mom's birthday is coming. I want to buy her a gift.
lines.zh: 安娜，妈妈的生日快到了。我想给她买个礼物。

lines.en: That's sweet, Tom! What does Mom like?
lines.zh: 真贴心，汤姆！妈妈喜欢什么？

lines.en: She likes flowers. But I want to get something special.
lines.zh: 她喜欢花。但我想买些特别的。

lines.en: How about a scarf? It's getting cold.
lines.zh: 围巾怎么样？天气变冷了。

lines.en: Can I help you find something?
Yes, please. I'm looking for a birthday gift for my mom.
lines.zh: 是的。我在给我妈妈找生日礼物。

lines.en: We have beautiful scarves in many colors. What's her favorite color?
lines.zh: 我们有很多漂亮的围巾。她最喜欢什么颜色？

lines.en: She likes red. Can I see that red one?
lines.zh: 她喜欢红色。我能看看那条红色的吗？

lines.en: Oh, this one is really pretty! Mom will love it!
lines.zh: 哦，这条真漂亮！妈妈一定会喜欢的！

lines.en: Great! I'll take it. Can you wrap it as a gift, please?
lines.zh: 太好了！我要了。请帮我包装成礼物好吗？
